'''Karn''' was a large, dark-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] loyal to [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]. Along with his subordinate [[Lhira]], he was in command of Iblis' six cells on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Stoga]]. He tried to apprehend [[Rasha Bex]] when [[BoShek/Legends|BoShek]] helped her return to her [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] overseers, but failed.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 23|''Empire'' 23]] {{1st}}
